svg.title: Candidate elimination algorithm flowchart
svg.desc: Flowchart of the candidate elimination algorithm showing initialization, example loop, positive and negative branches with S and G update rules, and termination.

g.text: Remove from G inconsistent with d
For each s in S not consistent
h consistent with d, g >=_g h
Remove from S more general than S
Remove from S inconsistent with d
For each g in G not consistent
h consistent with d, h >=_g s
Remove from G less general than G
